SQL:
-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- Calculate total cohort size for race/Hispanic origin categories for inclusion threshold
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_total_cohort_size_for_race_inclusion AS
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "respondent_sequence_number") AS "total_cohort_size_for_race_inclusion"
FROM final_master_table;

-- Calculate count of participant's race/Hispanic origin group for inclusion threshold
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_group_counts_for_inclusion AS
SELECT
    "race_hispanic_origin",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "respondent_sequence_number") AS "race_group_count_for_inclusion"
FROM final_master_table
GROUP BY "race_hispanic_origin";

-- Calculate threshold inclusion for each participant
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_threshold_inclusion_calc AS
SELECT
    f."respondent_sequence_number",
    (1.0/5.0) * f."age_in_years_at_screening" * (rgc."race_group_count_for_inclusion"::NUMERIC / tcs."total_cohort_size_for_race_inclusion"::NUMERIC) AS "threshold_inclusion"
FROM final_master_table f
JOIN temp_race_group_counts_for_inclusion rgc ON f."race_hispanic_origin" = rgc."race_hispanic_origin"
CROSS JOIN temp_total_cohort_size_for_race_inclusion tcs;

-- STEP 1.1: Include individuals whose fasting plasma glucose (FPG, mmol/L) is not missing
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "fasting_glucose_mmol_l" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 1.2: From the above group, include only those whose fasting plasma glucose (FPG, mmol/L) is not less than threshold inclusion
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_threshold_inclusion_calc tic ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = tic."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."fasting_glucose_mmol_l" >= tic."threshold_inclusion";

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- Calculate total cohort size for race/Hispanic origin categories for exclusion threshold B
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_total_cohort_size_for_race_exclusion AS
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i."respondent_sequence_number") AS "total_cohort_size_for_race_exclusion"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i;

-- Calculate count of participant's race/Hispanic origin group for exclusion threshold B
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_group_counts_for_exclusion AS
SELECT
    f."race_hispanic_origin",
    COUNT(DISTINCT i."respondent_sequence_number") AS "race_group_count_for_exclusion"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
GROUP BY f."race_hispanic_origin";

-- Calculate threshold B for each participant in the current cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_threshold_b_calc AS
SELECT
    i."respondent_sequence_number",
    (1.0/5.0) * f."age_in_years_at_screening" * (rgc."race_group_count_for_exclusion"::NUMERIC / tcs."total_cohort_size_for_race_exclusion"::NUMERIC) AS "threshold_b"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race_group_counts_for_exclusion rgc ON f."race_hispanic_origin" = rgc."race_hispanic_origin"
CROSS JOIN temp_total_cohort_size_for_race_exclusion tcs;

-- STEP 2.1: Identify participants satisfying condition_group_1
-- (fasting plasma glucose (FPG, mmol/L) is missing OR fasting plasma glucose (FPG, mmol/L) < threshold B)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_condition_group_1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
           WHEN f."fasting_glucose_mmol_l" IS NULL OR f."fasting_glucose_mmol_l" < tb."threshold_b" THEN TRUE
           ELSE FALSE
       END AS "condition_group_1_flag"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_threshold_b_calc tb ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = tb."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 2.2: Identify participants satisfying condition_group_2
-- (gender != female AND age in years at screening >= 60 AND taking diabetic pills to lower blood sugar = false)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_condition_group_2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
           WHEN f."gender" != 'Female' AND f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 60 AND f."take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar" = 'No' THEN TRUE
           ELSE FALSE
       END AS "condition_group_2_flag"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 2.3: Identify participants for complex exclusion criteria (condition_group_1 AND condition_group_2)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_complex_exclusion_criteria AS
SELECT cg1."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_condition_group_1 cg1
JOIN temp_condition_group_2 cg2 ON cg1."respondent_sequence_number" = cg2."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE cg1."condition_group_1_flag" = TRUE AND cg2."condition_group_2_flag" = TRUE;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude participants based on complex exclusion criteria
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
LEFT JOIN temp_complex_exclusion_criteria tec ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = tec."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE tec."respondent_sequence_number" IS NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Covariate: Index Y
-- Step 1: Calculate waist-to-weight ratio
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_waist_to_weight_ratio AS
SELECT
    c."respondent_sequence_number",
    f."waist_circumference_cm" / f."weight_kg" AS "waist_to_weight_ratio",
    f."creatinine_mg_dl",
    f."albumin_urine_mg_l",
    f."creatinine_urine_mg_dl",
    f."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Step 2: Assign age group for covariate
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_group_covariate AS
SELECT
    "respondent_sequence_number",
    CASE
        WHEN "age_in_years_at_screening" < 30 THEN '<30 years'
        WHEN "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 30 AND "age_in_years_at_screening" < 60 THEN '30 to <60 years'
        WHEN "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 60 THEN '>=60 years'
        ELSE NULL
    END AS "age_group_covariate"
FROM temp_waist_to_weight_ratio;

-- Step 3: Calculate intermediate product 1 = waist-to-weight ratio * serum creatinine (mg/dL)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_intermediate_product_1 AS
SELECT
    t."respondent_sequence_number",
    t."waist_to_weight_ratio" * t."creatinine_mg_dl" AS "intermediate_product_1",
    t."albumin_urine_mg_l",
    t."creatinine_urine_mg_dl",
    ag."age_group_covariate"
FROM temp_waist_to_weight_ratio t
JOIN temp_age_group_covariate ag ON t."respondent_sequence_number" = ag."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Step 4: Calculate 65th percentile of intermediate product 1 within participant's age group
-- Refactored: Calculate percentile per age group first
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1_per_age_group AS
SELECT
    "age_group_covariate",
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.65) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "intermediate_product_1") AS "65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1_value"
FROM temp_intermediate_product_1
GROUP BY "age_group_covariate";

-- Refactored: Join percentile back to original data
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_percentile_intermediate_product_1_by_age_group AS
SELECT
    tip1."respondent_sequence_number",
    tip1."age_group_covariate",
    tip1."intermediate_product_1",
    tip1."albumin_urine_mg_l", -- Add this line as per advice
    tip1."creatinine_urine_mg_dl", -- Add this line as per advice
    p."65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1_value" AS "65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1"
FROM temp_intermediate_product_1 tip1
JOIN temp_65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1_per_age_group p
    ON tip1."age_group_covariate" = p."age_group_covariate";

-- Step 5: Calculate urine albumin-to-creatinine ratio (mg/g) = 100 * (urine albumin mg/L / urine creatinine mg/dL)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_uacr_covariate AS
SELECT
    t."respondent_sequence_number",
    t."intermediate_product_1",
    t."age_group_covariate",
    t."65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1",
    (100.0 * t."albumin_urine_mg_l" / t."creatinine_urine_mg_dl") AS "urine_albumin_to_creatinine_ratio_covariate"
FROM temp_percentile_intermediate_product_1_by_age_group t;

-- Step 6: Calculate median urine albumin-to-creatinine ratio (mg/g) within participant's age group
-- Refactored: Calculate median per age group first
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_median_uacr_per_age_group_covariate AS
SELECT
    "age_group_covariate",
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "urine_albumin_to_creatinine_ratio_covariate") AS "median_uacr_value"
FROM temp_uacr_covariate
GROUP BY "age_group_covariate";

-- Refactored: Join median back to original data
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_median_uacr_by_age_group_covariate AS
SELECT
    tuc."respondent_sequence_number",
    tuc."intermediate_product_1",
    tuc."age_group_covariate",
    tuc."65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1",
    tuc."urine_albumin_to_creatinine_ratio_covariate",
    m."median_uacr_value" AS "median_uacr_by_age_group_covariate"
FROM temp_uacr_covariate tuc
JOIN temp_median_uacr_per_age_group_covariate m
    ON tuc."age_group_covariate" = m."age_group_covariate";

-- Step 7: Calculate Index Y
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_index_y AS
SELECT
    "respondent_sequence_number",
    ("intermediate_product_1" / "65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1") * ("urine_albumin_to_creatinine_ratio_covariate" / "median_uacr_by_age_group_covariate") AS "index_y"
FROM temp_median_uacr_by_age_group_covariate
WHERE "65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1" IS NOT NULL
  AND "median_uacr_by_age_group_covariate" IS NOT NULL
  AND "65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1" != 0
  AND "median_uacr_by_age_group_covariate" != 0;


-- 4.2 Predictor: Benchmark ABC
-- Step 1: Calculate weight-adjusted waist ratio (WWI) = waist circumference (cm) / sqrt(weight (kg))
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_wwi AS
SELECT
    c."respondent_sequence_number",
    f."waist_circumference_cm" / SQRT(f."weight_kg") AS "weight_adjusted_waist_ratio_wwi",
    f."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Step 2: Assign age group predictor labels
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_group_predictor AS
SELECT
    "respondent_sequence_number",
    CASE
        WHEN "age_in_years_at_screening" < 30 THEN 'younger than 30 years'
        WHEN "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 30 AND "age_in_years_at_screening" < 60 THEN '30 years or older and younger than 60 years'
        WHEN "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 60 THEN '60 years or older'
        ELSE NULL
    END AS "age_group_predictor"
FROM temp_wwi;

-- Combine WWI with age group for percentile calculation
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_wwi_with_age_group_predictor AS
SELECT
    t."respondent_sequence_number",
    t."weight_adjusted_waist_ratio_wwi",
    ag."age_group_predictor"
FROM temp_wwi t
JOIN temp_age_group_predictor ag ON t."respondent_sequence_number" = ag."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Step 3: Calculate 70th percentile of WWI within participant's age group
-- Refactored: Calculate percentile per age group first
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_70th_percentile_wwi_per_age_group AS
SELECT
    "age_group_predictor",
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.70) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "weight_adjusted_waist_ratio_wwi") AS "70th_percentile_wwi_value"
FROM temp_wwi_with_age_group_predictor
GROUP BY "age_group_predictor";

-- Refactored: Join percentile back to original data
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_70th_percentile_wwi_by_age_group AS
SELECT
    twwi."respondent_sequence_number",
    twwi."weight_adjusted_waist_ratio_wwi",
    twwi."age_group_predictor",
    p."70th_percentile_wwi_value" AS "70th_percentile_wwi_by_age_group"
FROM temp_wwi_with_age_group_predictor twwi
JOIN temp_70th_percentile_wwi_per_age_group p
    ON twwi."age_group_predictor" = p."age_group_predictor";

-- Step 4: Calculate size of participant's age group
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_group_sizes_predictor AS
SELECT
    "age_group_predictor",
    COUNT("respondent_sequence_number") AS "size_of_age_group"
FROM temp_age_group_predictor
GROUP BY "age_group_predictor";

-- Step 5: Calculate size of largest age group in the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_size_of_largest_age_group AS
SELECT MAX("size_of_age_group") AS "size_of_largest_age_group"
FROM temp_age_group_sizes_predictor;

-- Step 6: Calculate Benchmark ABC
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_benchmark_abc AS
SELECT
    t."respondent_sequence_number",
    (t."weight_adjusted_waist_ratio_wwi" / t."70th_percentile_wwi_by_age_group") * (ags."size_of_age_group"::NUMERIC / slg."size_of_largest_age_group"::NUMERIC) AS "benchmark_abc"
FROM temp_70th_percentile_wwi_by_age_group t

JOIN temp_threshold_b_calc tb ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = tb."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 2.2: Identify participants satisfying condition_group_2
-- (gender != female AND age in years at screening >= 60 AND taking diabetic pills to lower blood sugar = false)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_condition_group_2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
           WHEN f."gender" != 'Female' AND f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 60 AND f."take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar" = 'No' THEN TRUE
           ELSE FALSE
       END AS "condition_group_2_flag"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 2.3: Identify participants for complex exclusion criteria (condition_group_1 AND condition_group_2)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_complex_exclusion_criteria AS
SELECT cg1."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_condition_group_1 cg1
JOIN temp_condition_group_2 cg2 ON cg1."respondent_sequence_number" = cg2."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE cg1."condition_group_1_flag" = TRUE AND cg2."condition_group_2_flag" = TRUE;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude participants based on complex exclusion criteria
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
LEFT JOIN temp_complex_exclusion_criteria tec ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = tec."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE tec."respondent_sequence_number" IS NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Covariate: Index Y
-- Step 1: Calculate waist-to-weight ratio
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_waist_to_weight_ratio AS
SELECT
    c."respondent_sequence_number",
    f."waist_circumference_cm" / f."weight_kg" AS "waist_to_weight_ratio",
    f."creatinine_mg_dl",
    f."albumin_urine_mg_l",
    f."creatinine_urine_mg_dl",
    f."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Step 2: Assign age group for covariate
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_group_covariate AS
SELECT
    "respondent_sequence_number",
    CASE
        WHEN "age_in_years_at_screening" < 30 THEN '<30 years'
        WHEN "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 30 AND "age_in_years_at_screening" < 60 THEN '30 to <60 years'
        WHEN "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 60 THEN '>=60 years'
        ELSE NULL
    END AS "age_group_covariate"
FROM temp_waist_to_weight_ratio;

-- Step 3: Calculate intermediate product 1 = waist-to-weight ratio * serum creatinine (mg/dL)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_intermediate_product_1 AS
SELECT
    t."respondent_sequence_number",
    t."waist_to_weight_ratio" * t."creatinine_mg_dl" AS "intermediate_product_1",
    t."albumin_urine_mg_l",
    t."creatinine_urine_mg_dl",
    ag."age_group_covariate"
FROM temp_waist_to_weight_ratio t
JOIN temp_age_group_covariate ag ON t."respondent_sequence_number" = ag."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Step 4: Calculate 65th percentile of intermediate product 1 within participant's age group
-- Refactored: Calculate percentile per age group first
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1_per_age_group AS
SELECT
    "age_group_covariate",
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.65) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "intermediate_product_1") AS "65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1_value"
FROM temp_intermediate_product_1
GROUP BY "age_group_covariate";

-- Refactored: Join percentile back to original data
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_percentile_intermediate_product_1_by_age_group AS
SELECT
    tip1."respondent_sequence_number",
    tip1."age_group_covariate",
    tip1."intermediate_product_1",
    tip1."albumin_urine_mg_l", -- Add this line as per advice
    tip1."creatinine_urine_mg_dl", -- Add this line as per advice
    p."65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1_value" AS "65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1"
FROM temp_intermediate_product_1 tip1
JOIN temp_65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1_per_age_group p
    ON tip1."age_group_covariate" = p."age_group_covariate";

-- Step 5: Calculate urine albumin-to-creatinine ratio (mg/g) = 100 * (urine albumin mg/L / urine creatinine mg/dL)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_uacr_covariate AS
SELECT
    t."respondent_sequence_number",
    t."intermediate_product_1",
    t."age_group_covariate",
    t."65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1",
    (100.0 * t."albumin_urine_mg_l" / t."creatinine_urine_mg_dl") AS "urine_albumin_to_creatinine_ratio_covariate"
FROM temp_percentile_intermediate_product_1_by_age_group t;

-- Step 6: Calculate median urine albumin-to-creatinine ratio (mg/g) within participant's age group
-- Refactored: Calculate median per age group first
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_median_uacr_per_age_group_covariate AS
SELECT
    "age_group_covariate",
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "urine_albumin_to_creatinine_ratio_covariate") AS "median_uacr_value"
FROM temp_uacr_covariate
GROUP BY "age_group_covariate";

-- Refactored: Join median back to original data
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_median_uacr_by_age_group_covariate AS
SELECT
    tuc."respondent_sequence_number",
    tuc."intermediate_product_1",
    tuc."age_group_covariate",
    tuc."65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1",
    tuc."urine_albumin_to_creatinine_ratio_covariate",
    m."median_uacr_value" AS "median_uacr_by_age_group_covariate"
FROM temp_uacr_covariate tuc
JOIN temp_median_uacr_per_age_group_covariate m
    ON tuc."age_group_covariate" = m."age_group_covariate";

-- Step 7: Calculate Index Y
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_index_y AS
SELECT
    "respondent_sequence_number",
    ("intermediate_product_1" / "65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1") * ("urine_albumin_to_creatinine_ratio_covariate" / "median_uacr_by_age_group_covariate") AS "index_y"
FROM temp_median_uacr_by_age_group_covariate
WHERE "65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1" IS NOT NULL
  AND "median_uacr_by_age_group_covariate" IS NOT NULL
  AND "65th_percentile_intermediate_product_1" != 0
  AND "median_uacr_by_age_group_covariate" != 0;


-- 4.2 Predictor: Benchmark ABC
-- Step 1: Calculate weight-adjusted waist ratio (WWI) = waist circumference (cm) / sqrt(weight (kg))
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_wwi AS
SELECT
    c."respondent_sequence_number",
    f."waist_circumference_cm" / SQRT(f."weight_kg") AS "weight_adjusted_waist_ratio_wwi",
    f."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Step 2: Assign age group predictor labels
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_group_predictor AS
SELECT
    "respondent_sequence_number",
    CASE
        WHEN "age_in_years_at_screening" < 30 THEN 'younger than 30 years'
        WHEN "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 30 AND "age_in_years_at_screening" < 60 THEN '30 years or older and younger than 60 years'
        WHEN "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 60 THEN '60 years or older'
        ELSE NULL
    END AS "age_group_predictor"
FROM temp_wwi;

-- Combine WWI with age group for percentile calculation
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_wwi_with_age_group_predictor AS
SELECT
    t."respondent_sequence_number",
    t."weight_adjusted_waist_ratio_wwi",
    ag."age_group_predictor"
FROM temp_wwi t
JOIN temp_age_group_predictor ag ON t."respondent_sequence_number" = ag."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Step 3: Calculate 70th percentile of WWI within participant's age group
-- Refactored: Calculate percentile per age group first
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_70th_percentile_wwi_per_age_group AS
SELECT
    "age_group_predictor",
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.70) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "weight_adjusted_waist_ratio_wwi") AS "70th_percentile_wwi_value"
FROM temp_wwi_with_age_group_predictor
GROUP BY "age_group_predictor";

-- Refactored: Join percentile back to original data
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_70th_percentile_wwi_by_age_group AS
SELECT
    twwi."respondent_sequence_number",
    twwi."weight_adjusted_waist_ratio_wwi",
    twwi."age_group_predictor",
    p."70th_percentile_wwi_value" AS "70th_percentile_wwi_by_age_group"
FROM temp_wwi_with_age_group_predictor twwi
JOIN temp_70th_percentile_wwi_per_age_group p
    ON twwi."age_group_predictor" = p."age_group_predictor";

-- Step 4: Calculate size of participant's age group
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_group_sizes_predictor AS
SELECT
    "age_group_predictor",
    COUNT("respondent_sequence_number") AS "size_of_age_group"
FROM temp_age_group_predictor
GROUP BY "age_group_predictor";

-- Step 5: Calculate size of largest age group in the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_size_of_largest_age_group AS
SELECT MAX("size_of_age_group") AS "size_of_largest_age_group"
FROM temp_age_group_sizes_predictor;

-- Step 6: Calculate Benchmark ABC
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_benchmark_abc AS
SELECT
    t."respondent_sequence_number",
    (t."weight_adjusted_waist_ratio_wwi" / t."70th_percentile_wwi_by_age_group") * (ags."size_of_age_group"::NUMERIC / slg."size_of_largest_age_group"::NUMERIC) AS "benchmark_abc"
FROM temp_70th_percentile_wwi_by_age_group t
JOIN temp_age_group_sizes_predictor ags ON t."age_group_predictor" = ags."age_group_predictor"
CROSS JOIN temp_size_of_largest_age_group slg
WHERE t."70th_percentile_wwi_by_age_group" IS NOT NULL
  AND t."70th_percentile_wwi_by_age_group" != 0;


-- 4.3 Outcome: Presence of Kidney Disease
-- Step 1: Calculate urine albumin-to-creatinine ratio (UACR) (mg/g)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_uacr_outcome AS
SELECT
    c."respondent_sequence_number",
    (100.0 * f."albumin_urine_mg_l" / f."creatinine_urine_mg_dl") AS "urine_albumin_to_creatinine_ratio_uacr_mg_g"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."creatinine_urine_mg_dl" IS NOT NULL AND f."creatinine_urine_mg_dl" != 0;

-- Step 2: Determine presence of kidney disease
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_presence_of_kidney_disease AS
SELECT
    "respondent_sequence_number",
    CASE
        WHEN "urine_albumin_to_creatinine_ratio_uacr_mg_g" >= 30 THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END AS "presence_of_kidney_disease"
FROM temp_uacr_outcome;

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  iy."index_y",
  ba."benchmark_abc",
  pkd."presence_of_kidney_disease"
FROM temp_cohort c
LEFT JOIN temp_index_y iy ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = iy."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_benchmark_abc ba ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = ba."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_presence_of_kidney_disease pkd ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = pkd."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes all patients whose age in years at screening was 30 years or older
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 30;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude patients with missing serum albumin (g/dL)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."albumin_g_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude patients with missing glycoprotein HbA1c (%)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."glycohemoglobin" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude patients with missing retinopathy status
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude patients with missing gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."gender" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude patients with missing race/hispanic origin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."race_hispanic_origin" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.6: Exclude patients with missing age in years at screening
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step6 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.7: Exclude patients with missing age when first told diabetes
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step7 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step6 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.8: Intermediate cohort for calculating medians/percentiles for derived exclusion
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort_for_derived_exclusion_calcs AS
SELECT
    i."respondent_sequence_number",
    f."albumin_g_dl",
    f."gender",
    f."glycohemoglobin",
    f."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_exclusion_step7 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 2.9: Calculate median serum albumin (g/dL) by gender within the current cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_median_albumin_by_gender AS
SELECT
    "gender",
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "albumin_g_dl") AS median_albumin
FROM temp_cohort_for_derived_exclusion_calcs
GROUP BY "gender";

-- STEP 2.10: Calculate 75th percentile of glycoprotein HbA1c (%) by race/hispanic origin within the current cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_75th_percentile_hba1c_by_race AS
SELECT
    "race_hispanic_origin",
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "glycohemoglobin") AS percentile_hba1c
FROM temp_cohort_for_derived_exclusion_calcs
GROUP BY "race_hispanic_origin";

-- STEP 2.11: Exclude participants with low serum albumin AND low glycoprotein HbA1c
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step8 AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_cohort_for_derived_exclusion_calcs c
LEFT JOIN temp_median_albumin_by_gender m ON c."gender" = m."gender"
LEFT JOIN temp_75th_percentile_hba1c_by_race p ON c."race_hispanic_origin" = p."race_hispanic_origin"
WHERE NOT (
    c."albumin_g_dl" < m.median_albumin
    AND c."glycohemoglobin" < p.percentile_hba1c
);

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step8;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Gender (Covariate)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Age in years at screening (Covariate)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_in_years_at_screening AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Race/Hispanic origin (Covariate)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
           WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic White' THEN 'white'
           WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic Black' THEN 'black'
           WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Mexican American' THEN 'mexican american'
           WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" IN ('Other Hispanic', 'Other Race - Including Multi-Racial') THEN 'other'
           ELSE NULL
       END AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Serum albumin (g/dL) (Predictor)
-- Extract raw serum albumin values for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_predictor_albumin_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."albumin_g_dl"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Compute quartile cutoffs for serum albumin within the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_predictor_albumin_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "albumin_g_dl") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5)  WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "albumin_g_dl") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "albumin_g_dl") AS q3
FROM temp_predictor_albumin_raw;

-- Assign serum albumin quartile group
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_predictor_albumin_quartiles AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN "albumin_g_dl" IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN "albumin_g_dl" < (SELECT q1 FROM temp_predictor_albumin_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1: <25%'
    WHEN "albumin_g_dl" < (SELECT q2 FROM temp_predictor_albumin_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2: ≥25 and <50%'
    WHEN "albumin_g_dl" < (SELECT q3 FROM temp_predictor_albumin_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3: ≥50 and <75%'
    ELSE 'Q4: ≥75%'
  END AS "serum_albumin_g_dl"
FROM temp_predictor_albumin_raw;

-- 4.5 Diabetic retinopathy (Outcome)
-- Map 'Yes' to 1 and 'No' to 0 for diabetic retinopathy
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_outcome_retinopathy AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
           WHEN f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" = 'Yes' THEN 1
           WHEN f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" = 'No' THEN 0
           ELSE NULL
       END AS "diabetic_retinopathy"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  g."gender",
  a."age_in_years_at_screening",
  r."race_hispanic_origin",
  p."serum_albumin_g_dl",
  o."diabetic_retinopathy"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_gender g ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = g."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_age_in_years_at_screening a ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = a."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin r ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = r."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_predictor_albumin_quartiles p ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = p."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_outcome_retinopathy o ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = o."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

SQL:
-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes all patients whose age in years at screening was 30 years or older
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 30;

-- STEP 1.2: From the above group, include only those with complete data on serum albumin (g/dL)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."albumin_g_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 1.3: From the above group, include only those with complete data on diabetes affected eyes/had retinopathy
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude patients with missing serum albumin (g/dL)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."albumin_g_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude patients with missing glycoprotein HbA1c (%)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."glycohemoglobin" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude patients with missing retinopathy status
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude patients with missing gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."gender" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude patients with missing race/Hispanic origin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."race_hispanic_origin" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.6: Exclude patients with missing age in years at screening
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step6 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.7: Exclude patients with missing age when first told diabetes
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step7 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step6 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.8: Exclude participants whose serum albumin (g/dL) is below the 20th percentile
-- Calculate 20th percentile of serum albumin (g/dL) within subgroups defined by race/Hispanic origin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_albumin_20th_percentile_threshold AS
SELECT
    "race_hispanic_origin",
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.20) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "albumin_g_dl") AS "serum_albumin_20th_percentile_threshold"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 30
  AND "albumin_g_dl" IS NOT NULL
  AND "race_hispanic_origin" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "race_hispanic_origin";

-- Exclude participants whose serum albumin (g/dL) is less than the calculated 20th percentile threshold
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step8 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step7 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_albumin_20th_percentile_threshold p ON f."race_hispanic_origin" = p."race_hispanic_origin"
WHERE f."albumin_g_dl" >= p."serum_albumin_20th_percentile_threshold";

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step8;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Gender
-- Extract gender for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Age in years at screening
-- Extract age in years at screening for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_in_years_at_screening AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Race/Hispanic origin
-- Map race/Hispanic origin to 'white', 'black', 'mexican american', 'other'
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
           WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic White' THEN 'white'
           WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic Black' THEN 'black'
           WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Mexican American' THEN 'mexican american'
           WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" IN ('Other Hispanic', 'Other Race - Including Multi-Racial') THEN 'other'
           ELSE NULL
       END AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Serum albumin (g/dL) (Predictor)
-- Extract raw serum albumin (g/dL) values for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_predictor_albumin_g_dl_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."albumin_g_dl"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Compute quartile cutoffs for serum albumin (g/dL) within the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_predictor_albumin_g_dl_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "albumin_g_dl") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "albumin_g_dl") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "albumin_g_dl") AS q3
FROM temp_predictor_albumin_g_dl_raw
WHERE "albumin_g_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- Assign serum albumin (g/dL) to quartile groups
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_predictor_albumin_g_dl_quartiles AS
SELECT
  r."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN r."albumin_g_dl" IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN r."albumin_g_dl" < (SELECT q1 FROM temp_predictor_albumin_g_dl_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1: <25%'
    WHEN r."albumin_g_dl" < (SELECT q2 FROM temp_predictor_albumin_g_dl_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2: ≥25% and <50%'
    WHEN r."albumin_g_dl" < (SELECT q3 FROM temp_predictor_albumin_g_dl_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3: ≥50% and <75%'
    ELSE 'Q4: ≥75%'
  END AS "serum_albumin_g_dl"
FROM temp_predictor_albumin_g_dl_raw r;

-- 4.5 Diabetic retinopathy (Outcome)
-- Map "diabetes affected eyes had retinopathy?" to 1 for 'Yes' and 0 for 'No'
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_outcome_diabetic_retinopathy AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
           WHEN f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" = 'Yes' THEN 1
           WHEN f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" = 'No' THEN 0
           ELSE NULL
       END AS "diabetic_retinopathy"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  g."gender",
  a."age_in_years_at_screening",
  r."race_hispanic_origin",
  p."serum_albumin_g_dl",
  o."diabetic_retinopathy"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_gender g ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = g."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_age_in_years_at_screening a ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = a."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin r ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = r."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_predictor_albumin_g_dl_quartiles p ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = p."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_outcome_diabetic_retinopathy o ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = o."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

Question:
We will plan to do a weighted logistic regression using exam weights from NHANES data from 2007-2008. 
 We will include participants who has diabetes when diabetes is defined as meeting any of the following requirements: reported yes when asked doctor told you have diabetes, or fasting plasma glucose (FPG, mmol/L) ≥7.0 mmol/L, or glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%) ≥6.5%, or who takes diabetic pills to lower blood sugar.
 We will exclude participants whose age at screening is less than 20, pregnant at the exam, and had missing values of weight (kg), waist circumference (cm). We will exclude participants who are missing gender, race/Hispanic origin, urine albumin (mg/L), or urine creatinine (mg/dL), serum creatinine (mg/dl).
 The predictor is a two-stage benchmarked WWI score defined as WWI (waist circumference (cm) divided by the square root of weight (kg)) divided by the race/Hispanic origin specific mean WWI calculated among participants in the cohort, and then divided by the gender specific median of that race-standardized WWI calculated from the same eligible cohort, producing a single continuous predictor.
 The outcome of interest is the presence of kidney disease, defined as either an estimated glomerular filtration rate (eGFR) below 60 mL/min/1.73m^2 or a urine albumin-to-creatinine ratio (UACR) (mg/g) of 30 mg/g or greater. eGFR can be calculated using gender, serum creatinine (mg/dl), age at screening, race/Hispanic origin information for 4 different cases: 1. if gender is female and race/Hispanic origin is Non-Hispanic Black : 141 * min(serum creatinine (mg/dl) / 0.7, 1) ** -0.329 * max(serum creatinine (mg/dl) / 0.7, 1) ** -1.209 * (0.993 ** age at screening) * 1.018 * 1.159. 2. if gender is female and race/Hispanic origin is not Non-Hispanic Black : 141 * min(serum creatinine (mg/dl) / 0.7, 1) ** -0.329 * max(serum creatinine (mg/dl) / 0.7, 1) ** -1.209 * (0.993 ** age at screening) * 1.018. 3. if gender is male and race/Hispanic origin is Non-Hispanic Black : 141 * min(serum creatinine (mg/dl) / 0.9, 1) ** -0.411 * max(serum creatinine (mg/dl) / 0.9, 1) ** -1.209 * (0.993 ** age at screening) * 1.159. 4. if gender is male and race/Hispanic origin is not Non-Hispanic Black : 141 * min(serum creatinine (mg/dl) / 0.9, 1) ** -0.411 * max(serum creatinine (mg/dl) / 0.9, 1) ** -1.209 * (0.993 ** age at screening). Urine albumin-to-creatinine ratio (mg/g) is calculated as 100*(urine albumin mg/L / urine creatinine mg/dL) .
 Adjust the analysis for race/Hispanic origin (white and non white), gender, and age at screening (<60 and >=60).
Question Structured:
Analysis Type: weighted logistic regression (exam)

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 2007-2008

Inclusion Criteria:
- doctor told you have diabetes = Yes
OR
- fasting plasma glucose (FPG, mmol/L) >= 7.0 mmol/L
OR
- glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%) >= 6.5%
OR
- takes diabetic pills to lower blood sugar

Exclusion Criteria:
- age at screening < 20
- pregnant at the exam
- missing weight (kg)
- missing waist circumference (cm)
- missing gender
- missing race/Hispanic origin
- missing urine albumin (mg/L)
- missing urine creatinine (mg/dL)
- missing serum creatinine (mg/dl)

Covariates:
- race/Hispanic origin categorized as:
  "white",
  "non white"
- gender
- age at screening categorized as:
  "<60",
  ">=60"

Predictor:
- two-stage benchmarked WWI score calculated as:
  1. WWI = waist circumference (cm) / sqrt(weight (kg))
  2. Race/Hispanic origin specific mean WWI calculated among eligible participants in the cohort.
  3. Race-standardized WWI = WWI / Race/Hispanic origin specific mean WWI
  4. Gender specific median of race-standardized WWI calculated from the same eligible cohort.
  5. Predictor = Race-standardized WWI / Gender specific median of race-standardized WWI

Outcome:
- presence of kidney disease = 1 if (eGFR < 60 mL/min/1.73m^2 OR UACR (mg/g) >= 30 mg/g); 0 otherwise
  - eGFR (mL/min/1.73m^2) calculated for 4 cases:
    1. If gender is female AND race/Hispanic origin is Non-Hispanic Black:
       141 * min(serum creatinine (mg/dl) / 0.7, 1) ** -0.329 * max(serum creatinine (mg/dl) / 0.7, 1) ** -1.209 * (0.993 ** age at screening) * 1.018 * 1.159
    2. If gender is female AND race/Hispanic origin is not Non-Hispanic Black:
       141 * min(serum creatinine (mg/dl) / 0.7, 1) ** -0.329 * max(serum creatinine (mg/dl) / 0.7, 1) ** -1.209 * (0.993 ** age at screening) * 1.018
    3. If gender is male AND race/Hispanic origin is Non-Hispanic Black:
       141 * min(serum creatinine (mg/dl) / 0.9, 1) ** -0.411 * max(serum creatinine (mg/dl) / 0.9, 1) ** -1.209 * (0.993 ** age at screening) * 1.159
    4. If gender is male AND race/Hispanic origin is not Non-Hispanic Black:
       141 * min(serum creatinine (mg/dl) / 0.9, 1) ** -0.411 * max(serum creatinine (mg/dl) / 0.9, 1) ** -1.209 * (0.993 ** age at screening)
  - UACR (mg/g) calculated as:
    100 * (urine albumin (mg/L) / urine creatinine (mg/dL))

SQL:
-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Include participants who reported 'Yes' to doctor told you have diabetes
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes';

-- STEP 1.2: Include participants with fasting plasma glucose (FPG, mmol/L) >= 7.0 mmol/L
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step2 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "fasting_glucose_mmol_l" >= 7.0;

-- STEP 1.3: Include participants with glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%) >= 6.5%
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step3 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "glycohemoglobin" >= 6.5;

-- STEP 1.4: Include participants who take diabetic pills to lower blood sugar
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step4 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar" = 'Yes';

-- STEP 1.5: Combine all inclusion criteria using OR logic
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM (
    SELECT "respondent_sequence_number" FROM temp_inclusion_step1
    UNION
    SELECT "respondent_sequence_number" FROM temp_inclusion_step2
    UNION
    SELECT "respondent_sequence_number" FROM temp_inclusion_step3
    UNION
    SELECT "respondent_sequence_number" FROM temp_inclusion_step4
) AS combined_inclusions;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude participants whose age at screening is less than 20
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 20;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude participants pregnant at the exam
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."pregnancy_status_at_exam" IS NULL
   OR f."pregnancy_status_at_exam" != 'Yes, positive lab pregnancy test or self-reported pregnant at exam';

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude participants with missing weight (kg)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."weight_kg" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude participants with missing waist circumference (cm)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."waist_circumference_cm" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude participants with missing gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."gender" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.6: Exclude participants with missing race/Hispanic origin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step6 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."race_hispanic_origin" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.7: Exclude participants with missing urine albumin (mg/L)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step7 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step6 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."albumin_urine_mg_l" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.8: Exclude participants with missing urine creatinine (mg/dL)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step8 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step7 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."creatinine_urine_mg_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.9: Exclude participants with missing serum creatinine (mg/dl)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step9 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step8 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."creatinine_mg_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Final Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step9;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Covariate: race/hispanic origin (white and non white)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic White' THEN 'white'
    ELSE 'non white'
  END AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Covariate: gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Covariate: age at screening (<60 and >=60)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_at_screening AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."age_in_years_at_screening" < 60 THEN '<60'
    WHEN f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 60 THEN '>=60'
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "age_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Predictor: two-stage benchmarked wwi score

-- STEP 4.4.1: Calculate WWI
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_wwi AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  f."race_hispanic_origin",
  f."gender",
  (f."waist_circumference_cm" / SQRT(f."weight_kg")) AS "wwi"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 4.4.2: Calculate Race/Hispanic origin specific mean WWI
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_specific_mean_wwi AS
SELECT
  "race_hispanic_origin",
  AVG("wwi") AS "race_specific_mean_wwi"
FROM temp_wwi
GROUP BY "race_hispanic_origin";

-- STEP 4.4.3: Calculate Race-standardized WWI
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_standardized_wwi AS
SELECT
  t. "respondent_sequence_number",
  t. "gender",
  (t."wwi" / r."race_specific_mean_wwi") AS "race_standardized_wwi"
FROM temp_wwi t
JOIN temp_race_specific_mean_wwi r ON t."race_hispanic_origin" = r."race_hispanic_origin";

-- STEP 4.4.4: Calculate Gender specific median of race-standardized WWI
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender_specific_median_race_standardized_wwi AS
SELECT
  "gender",
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "race_standardized_wwi") AS "gender_specific_median_race_standardized_wwi"
FROM temp_race_standardized_wwi
GROUP BY "gender";

-- STEP 4.4.5: Calculate Two-stage benchmarked WWI score
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_two_stage_benchmarked_wwi_score AS
SELECT
  t. "respondent_sequence_number",
  (t."race_standardized_wwi" / g."gender_specific_median_race_standardized_wwi") AS "two_stage_benchmarked_wwi_score"
FROM temp_race_standardized_wwi t
JOIN temp_gender_specific_median_race_standardized_wwi g ON t."gender" = g."gender";

-- 4.5 Outcome: presence of kidney disease

-- STEP 4.5.1: Calculate UACR (mg/g)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_uacr AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  (100.0 * (f."albumin_urine_mg_l" / f."creatinine_urine_mg_dl")) AS "uacr_mg_g"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 4.5.2: Calculate eGFR (mL/min/1.73m^2)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_egfr AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."gender" = 'Female' AND f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic Black' THEN
      141 * POWER(LEAST(f."creatinine_mg_dl" / 0.7, 1), -0.329) * POWER(GREATEST(f."creatinine_mg_dl" / 0.7, 1), -1.209) * POWER(0.993, f."age_in_years_at_screening") * 1.018 * 1.159
    WHEN f."gender" = 'Female' AND f."race_hispanic_origin" != 'Non-Hispanic Black' THEN
      141 * POWER(LEAST(f."creatinine_mg_dl" / 0.7, 1), -0.329) * POWER(GREATEST(f."creatinine_mg_dl" / 0.7, 1), -1.209) * POWER(0.993, f."age_in_years_at_screening") * 1.018
    WHEN f."gender" = 'Male' AND f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic Black' THEN
      141 * POWER(LEAST(f."creatinine_mg_dl" / 0.9, 1), -0.411) * POWER(GREATEST(f."creatinine_mg_dl" / 0.9, 1), -1.209) * POWER(0.993, f."age_in_years_at_screening") * 1.159
    WHEN f."gender" = 'Male' AND f."race_hispanic_origin" != 'Non-Hispanic Black' THEN
      141 * POWER(LEAST(f."creatinine_mg_dl" / 0.9, 1), -0.411) * POWER(GREATEST(f."creatinine_mg_dl" / 0.9, 1), -1.209) * POWER(0.993, f."age_in_years_at_screening")
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "egfr_ml_min_1_73m_2"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 4.5.3: Determine kidney_disease_raw
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_kidney_disease_raw AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN e."egfr_ml_min_1_73m_2" < 60 OR u."uacr_mg_g" >= 30 THEN TRUE
    ELSE FALSE
  END AS "kidney_disease_raw"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_egfr e ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = e."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_uacr u ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = u."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 4.5.4: Map to '1' or '0' for presence of kidney disease
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_presence_of_kidney_disease AS
SELECT
  "respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN "kidney_disease_raw" = TRUE THEN '1'
    ELSE '0'
  END AS "presence_of_kidney_disease"
FROM temp_kidney_disease_raw;

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  tr."race_hispanic_origin",
  tg."gender",
  ta."age_at_screening",
  tw."two_stage_benchmarked_wwi_score",
  tk."presence_of_kidney_disease"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin tr ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tr."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_gender tg ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tg."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_age_at_screening ta ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = ta."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_two_stage_benchmarked_wwi_score tw ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tw."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_presence_of_kidney_disease tk ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tk."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

SQL:
-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes all patients whose age in years at screening was 30 years or older
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 30;

-- STEP 1.2: From the above group, include only those with complete data on serum albumin (g/dl)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."albumin_g_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 1.3: From the above group, include only those with complete data on diabetes affected eyes/had retinopathy
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude patients with missing serum albumin (g/dl)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."albumin_g_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude patients with missing glycoprotein HbA1c (%)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."glycohemoglobin" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude patients with missing diabetic retinopathy status
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude patients with missing gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."gender" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude patients with missing race/Hispanic origin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."race_hispanic_origin" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.6: Exclude patients with missing age in years at screening
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step6 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.7: Exclude patients with missing age when first told diabetes
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step7 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step6 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.8: Exclude patients if their age in years at screening is less than 30 years old
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step8 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step7 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 30;

-- STEP 2.9: Exclude patients if age when first told the patient had diabetes was before age 30
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step9 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step8 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes" >= 30;

-- STEP 2.10: Exclude patients with uncertain diabetes status
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step10 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step9 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE NOT (f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Borderline' AND (f."glycohemoglobin" IS NULL OR f."glycohemoglobin" < 6.5));

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step10;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Gender (Covariate)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Age in years at screening (Covariate)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_in_years_at_screening AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Race/Hispanic Origin (Covariate)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
           WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic White' THEN 'white'
           WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic Black' THEN 'black'
           WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Mexican American' THEN 'mexican american'
           ELSE 'other'
       END AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Index ABC (Predictor)
-- Calculate raw index abc
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_index_abc_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       (f."albumin_g_dl" / f."glycohemoglobin") AS "index_abc_raw"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Adjust index abc based on gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_index_abc_adjusted AS
SELECT t."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
           WHEN f."gender" = 'Female' THEN t."index_abc_raw" * 1.2
           WHEN f."gender" = 'Male' THEN t."index_abc_raw" * 0.8
           ELSE NULL
       END AS "index_abc_adjusted"
FROM temp_index_abc_raw t
JOIN final_master_table f ON t."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Categorize index abc into low, medium, high
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_index_abc_binned AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
           WHEN "index_abc_adjusted" IS NULL THEN NULL
           WHEN "index_abc_adjusted" < 0.45 THEN 'low'
           WHEN "index_abc_adjusted" >= 0.45 AND "index_abc_adjusted" < 0.60 THEN 'medium'
           WHEN "index_abc_adjusted" >= 0.60 THEN 'high'
           ELSE NULL
       END AS "index_abc"
FROM temp_index_abc_adjusted;

-- 4.5 Diabetic Retinopathy (Outcome)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_diabetic_retinopathy AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
           WHEN f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" = 'Yes' THEN 1
           WHEN f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" = 'No' THEN 0
           ELSE NULL
       END AS "diabetic_retinopathy"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  g."gender",
  a."age_in_years_at_screening",
  r."race_hispanic_origin",
  p."index_abc",
  o."diabetic_retinopathy"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_gender g ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = g."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_age_in_years_at_screening a ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = a."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin r ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = r."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_index_abc_binned p ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = p."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_diabetic_retinopathy o ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = o."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

SQL:
-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes all patients whose age in years at screening was 30 years or older
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 30;

-- STEP 1.2: From the above group, include only those with complete data on serum albumin (g/dL)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."albumin_g_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 1.3: From the above group, include only those with complete data on diabetes affected eyes/had retinopathy
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude participants with missing serum albumin (g/dL)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."albumin_g_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude participants with missing glycoprotein HbA1c (%)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."glycohemoglobin" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude participants with missing diabetic retinopathy status
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude participants with missing gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."gender" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude participants with missing race/Hispanic origin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."race_hispanic_origin" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.6: Exclude participants with missing age at screening
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step6 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.7: Exclude participants with missing age when first told diabetes
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step7 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step6 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.8: Exclude participants if their age in years at screening is less than 30 years old
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step8 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step7 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 30;

-- STEP 2.9: Exclude participants if their age when first told the patient had diabetes was before age 30
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step9 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step8 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes" >= 30;

-- STEP 2.10: Exclude participants with uncertain diabetes status
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step10 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step9 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE NOT (f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Borderline' AND (f."glycohemoglobin" IS NULL OR f."glycohemoglobin" < 6.5));

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step10;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Race/Hispanic Origin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Age in years at screening
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_in_years_at_screening AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Deviation ABC covariate
-- Step 1: Determine 'buffered' status and get glycohemoglobin and gender for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_deviation_abc_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes' AS "buffered",
       f."glycohemoglobin",
       f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Step 2: Calculate mean glycoprotein HbA1c (%) within each gender group for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender_mean_hba1c AS
SELECT "gender",
       AVG("glycohemoglobin") AS "mean_glycohemoglobin"
FROM temp_deviation_abc_raw
GROUP BY "gender";

-- Step 3: Apply the if-else logic for Deviation ABC covariate
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_deviation_abc_covariate AS
SELECT r."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
           WHEN r."buffered" THEN 0.0
           ELSE r."glycohemoglobin" - m."mean_glycohemoglobin"
       END AS "deviation_abc_covariate"
FROM temp_deviation_abc_raw r
LEFT JOIN temp_gender_mean_hba1c m ON r."gender" = m."gender";

-- 4.5 Serum albumin (g/dL) - Predictor
-- Get raw serum albumin values for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_serum_albumin_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."albumin_g_dl" AS "serum_albumin_g_dl"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Compute quartile cutoffs for serum albumin within cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_serum_albumin_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "serum_albumin_g_dl") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "serum_albumin_g_dl") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "serum_albumin_g_dl") AS q3
FROM temp_serum_albumin_raw;

-- Assign serum albumin quartile group
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_serum_albumin_quartiles AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN "serum_albumin_g_dl" IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN "serum_albumin_g_dl" < (SELECT q1 FROM temp_serum_albumin_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1: <25%'
    WHEN "serum_albumin_g_dl" < (SELECT q2 FROM temp_serum_albumin_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2: ≥25% and <50%'
    WHEN "serum_albumin_g_dl" < (SELECT q3 FROM temp_serum_albumin_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3: ≥50% and <75%'
    ELSE 'Q4: ≥75%'
  END AS "serum_albumin_g_dl"
FROM temp_serum_albumin_raw;

-- 4.6 Diabetic retinopathy - Outcome
-- Map 'diabetes affected eyes had retinopathy?' to 1 for Yes, 0 for No
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_diabetic_retinopathy AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
           WHEN f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" = 'Yes' THEN 1
           WHEN f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" = 'No' THEN 0
           ELSE NULL
       END AS "diabetic_retinopathy"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  tg."gender",
  tr."race_hispanic_origin",
  ta."age_in_years_at_screening",
  td."deviation_abc_covariate",
  tsa."serum_albumin_g_dl",
  tdr."diabetic_retinopathy"
FROM temp_cohort c
LEFT JOIN temp_gender tg ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tg."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin tr ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tr."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_age_in_years_at_screening ta ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = ta."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_deviation_abc_covariate td ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = td."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_serum_albumin_quartiles tsa ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tsa."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_diabetic_retinopathy tdr ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tdr."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;
